description: Alice can register and run a precise ECS task definition, pass an admin-equivalent ECS task role, and the target role trusts ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com.

ground_truth.reasoning: Alice has ecs:RegisterTaskDefinition, ecs:RunTask, and iam:PassRole permissions; the target role trusts ECS tasks; and the target role has AdministratorAccess.

assertion_strategy: The benchmark wrapper asserts clean ECS RegisterTaskDefinition and RunTask edges, exact PassRole edge, ECS task-service trust edge, validated critical passrole_ecs finding, zero blocked/inconclusive/precondition_only target findings, no blockers on the validated target finding, and PASS states for the required ECS PassRole checks.
